title: Project Dyson: Engineering Planning for a Dyson Swarm (simulation code and research data)
description:
Simulation code, analysis scripts, and research data underpinning the Project Dyson publication series — an open, multi-model AI-consensus engineering-planning program for a Dyson swarm. This archive captures the Monte-Carlo economic models (ISRU crossover), packet-level TDMA / NS-3 swarm coordination simulations, multi-model deliberation analyses, and the controlled-baseline and repeated-trial datasets that support the manuscripts.

Reproducibility: analysis code lives under publications/scripts/ with pinned dependencies in requirements.txt; regenerating a paper's figures runs the corresponding generate_*_figures.py against the archived data.
notes: License note: the repository root LICENSE is GPL-3.0; the analysis-scripts pyproject.toml currently declares MIT. Reconcile before minting the DOI. Metadata here defaults to the repository-level GPL-3.0-or-later.
